chunks.title: The Covenant Warning
chunks.reason: Jeremiah delivers Yahweh's message regarding the covenant with Judah and Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Judgment on Idolatry
chunks.reason: Yahweh pronounces judgment on the conspiracy and idolatry of Judah using the olive tree metaphor.

chunks.title: Jeremiah's Complaint
chunks.reason: Jeremiah describes his discovery of the plot against him and petitions Yahweh for justice.

chunks.title: Judgment on Anathoth
chunks.reason: Yahweh declares specific punishment for the men of Anathoth who sought Jeremiah's life.
